svg.title: Orbit — C2 Container Diagram
svg.desc: C4 Level 2 Container diagram showing the React SPA, Spring Boot monolith, and all external systems with communication protocols
svg.text: Served as a static bundle from Vercel's global CDN.
Runs entirely in the user's browser after initial load.
React Router for client-side navigation and protected routes.
Axios for REST API calls with JWT interceptor for token attach and refresh.
SockJS + STOMP.js for WebSocket connection and message subscriptions.
JWT stored in memory (access token) and httpOnly cookie (refresh token).
Deployed on Vercel. Auto-deploy disabled — CI/CD via deploy hook only.
Single deployable JAR. Modular internal package structure.
No Spring Cloud — monolith eliminates service discovery overhead.
auth/ — JWT issuance, validation, refresh token rotation, BCrypt
user/ — profile management, avatar upload to R2
contact/ — connection requests, contact list, blocking
group/ — group CRUD, membership, roles, invite tokens, pinning
conversation/ — DM + group conversation records, mute, unread counts
message/ — send, edit, delete, reactions, read receipts, file upload
websocket/ — STOMP broker config, session registry, Kafka fan-out
search/ — user search, group search, message search
ai/ — Claude API client, summary, ask, replies, translate, tone
Spring Security filter validates JWT once at entry point.
Identity propagated internally via SecurityContext — no re-validation per layer.
Deployed on Render free tier. Deployed via Render API from GitHub Actions.
